title: DID-ify identity layer
notes: Confidence: 12% chance of missed bug. Six reviewers across correctness, maintainability, efficiency, elegance, readability, and decisions found zero P0/P1 issues and zero P2 issues. The two substantive findings (agora-7g2k.1, agora-7g2k.11/.2) are both about a stale doc comment and a magic-number style issue — neither touches runtime behavior. The did:key encoding path is simple (multicodec prefix + raw Ed25519 public key + multibase-base58btc), leaving little surface for subtle bugs. Residual risk: an implementation-level review that cannot inspect the actual byte-level encoding against the did:key spec test vectors.
close_reason: All subtasks complete; did:key identity layer code quality fixes applied
